'''鈭歱-p-h''' ('''kapapah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earthen|earthen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earthen|earthen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kapapah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipapah|thipapah]] || [[word:jipapah|jipapah]] || [[word:shipapah|shipapah]] || [[word:kipapah|kipapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupapah|thuthupapah]] || [[word:jujupapah|jujupapah]] || [[word:shushupapah|shushupapah]] || [[word:kukupapah|kukupapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupapah|thupapah]] || [[word:jupapah|jupapah]] || [[word:shupapah|shupapah]] || [[word:kupapah|kupapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupapah|thupapah]] || [[word:jupapah|jupapah]] || [[word:shupapah|shupapah]] || [[word:kupapah|kupapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepapah|thepapah]] || [[word:jepapah|jepapah]] || [[word:shepapah|shepapah]] || [[word:kepapah|kepapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopapah|thothopapah]] || [[word:jojopapah|jojopapah]] || [[word:shoshopapah|shoshopapah]] || [[word:kokopapah|kokopapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopapah|thopapah]] || [[word:jopapah|jopapah]] || [[word:shopapah|shopapah]] || [[word:kopapah|kopapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopapah|thopapah]] || [[word:jopapah|jopapah]] || [[word:shopapah|shopapah]] || [[word:kopapah|kopapah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]] || [[word:papah|papah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙papah|th忙papah]] || [[word:j忙papah|j忙papah]] || [[word:sh忙papah|sh忙papah]] || [[word:k忙papah|k忙papah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapapah|thathapapah]] || [[word:jajapapah|jajapapah]] || [[word:shashapapah|shashapapah]] || [[word:kakapapah|kakapapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapapah|thapapah]] || [[word:japapah|japapah]] || [[word:shapapah|shapapah]] || [[word:kapapah|kapapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapapah|thapapah]] || [[word:japapah|japapah]] || [[word:shapapah|shapapah]] || [[word:kapapah|kapapah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapapah|shapapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapapah|goshapapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapapah|gokishapapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapapahn眉|shapapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapapahnkn眉|goshapapahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapahn眉|gokishapapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapapahsh毛|shapapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapapahnksh毛|goshapapahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapapahsh毛|gokishapapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapahro|shapapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapahnkro|goshapapahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapahro|gokishapapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapahmu|shapapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapahnkmu|goshapapahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapahmu|gokishapapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapapahsher|shapapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapapahnksher|goshapapahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapapahsher|gokishapapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapapahng|shapapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapapahnkng|goshapapahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapapahng|gokishapapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapapahya|shapapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapapahnkya|goshapapahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapapahya|gokishapapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapapahyam|shapapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapapahnkyam|goshapapahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapapahyam|gokishapapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapahn眉sh毛|shapapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapahnkn眉sh毛|goshapapahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapahn眉sh毛|gokishapapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapahn眉ro|shapapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapahnkn眉ro|goshapapahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapahn眉ro|gokishapapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapahn眉mu|shapapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapahnkn眉mu|goshapapahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapahn眉mu|gokishapapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapahsh毛n眉|shapapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapahnksh毛n眉|goshapapahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapahsh毛n眉|gokishapapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapahsh毛ro|shapapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapahnksh毛ro|goshapapahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapahsh毛ro|gokishapapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapahsh毛mu|shapapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapahnksh毛mu|goshapapahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapahsh毛mu|gokishapapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapahron眉|shapapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapahnkron眉|goshapapahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapahron眉|gokishapapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapahrosh毛|shapapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapahnkrosh毛|goshapapahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapahrosh毛|gokishapapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapahromu|shapapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapahnkromu|goshapapahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapahromu|gokishapapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapahmun眉|shapapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapahnkmun眉|goshapapahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapahmun眉|gokishapapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapahmush毛|shapapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapahnkmush毛|goshapapahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapahmush毛|gokishapapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapahmuro|shapapahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapahnkmuro|goshapapahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapahmuro|gokishapapahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
